candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet total for current assets.
Non-current, so not ACT.
Non-current subtotal, not ACT.

candidates.row_label: Profit from sale of non-current asset
candidates.why: Cash-flow item, not a balance-sheet asset total.

variables.notes: Selected the reported balance-sheet subtotal for total current assets.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash line; preferred over cash-flow opening/closing labels.
Alternate wording but preview is blank; less preferred than the populated standard label.
Cash-flow statement opening balance, not the balance-sheet CHE target.

candidates.row_label: Market value adjustment of opening cash and cash equivalents
candidates.why: Adjustment line, not CHE.
Cash-flow closing balance; useful cross-check but balance-sheet label is preferred.

variables.notes: Priority given to the standard balance-sheet cash line; included the alternate balance-sheet wording as a secondary label for years where labels may change.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet total for current liabilities.
Non-current subtotal, not LCT.
Cash-flow line, not the balance-sheet current liabilities total.

candidates.row_label: Repayment and servicing of non-current liabilities
candidates.why: Cash-flow financing item, not LCT.

variables.notes: Selected the reported balance-sheet subtotal for total current liabilities.

candidates.why: Direct supplemental line for current maturities of long-term debt; matches STD definition and excludes lease-specific rows.
Appears in the current-liabilities section as a financing-related current liability component; possible fallback if the supplemental maturity line is unavailable in some years.
Appears in the current-liabilities section as short-term/current borrowing; possible fallback if labels change.

candidates.row_label: Capital Lease Maturities - Due within 1 Year
candidates.why: Explicit lease-related current maturity; excluded by STD baseline rule.
Lease liability; excluded by STD baseline rule.

variables.notes: R:c. Used the cleanest non-lease current debt line. Did not also include 'Mortgage debt and credit institutions' or 'Credit institutions' to avoid double counting against the total current maturity line.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet current tax payable label.

variables.notes: Exact tax-payable label on the balance sheet; valid even though preview values are blank.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet total PPE line; preferred over gross/in-progress/components.

candidates.row_label: Property, plant and equipment in progress-Gross
candidates.why: Only a component of PPE, not the total.

candidates.row_label: Profit/loss from sale of Property, Plant & Equipment
candidates.why: Cash-flow adjustment, not PPE stock.

candidates.row_label: Investments in property, plant and equipment
candidates.why: Capital expenditure flow, not PPE stock.

candidates.row_label: Sale of property, plant and equipment
candidates.why: Disposal flow, not PPE stock.

variables.notes: Selected the reported total PPE balance-sheet line.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet total assets line.

variables.notes: Selected the reported total assets line.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities Cash flow generated from investments
candidates.why: This is the reported operating cash flow total despite the concatenated wording; values align with net cash from operations.

final_choice.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities Cash flow generated from investments

variables.notes: Chosen as the operating cash flow total on the cash flow statement; label appears concatenated but clearly represents cash flow from operating activities.
